description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.6.4-stretch Docker image and a postgres:latest service, with a global before_script that prints the Python version and installs testing requirements via pip install -r requirements/testing.txt. Define a test job that runs in the default test stage, executes coverage run --source='apps' manage.py test --settings=config.settings.testing followed by coverage report, and sets a DATABASE_URL variable pointing to the postgres service using the POSTGRES_DB variable defined globally. Define a staging job of type deploy that only runs on the master branch, runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y ruby-full rubygems-integration, gem install dpl, and then dpl --provider=heroku --app=projectchirp --api-key=$HEROKU_STAGING_API_KEY to deploy to Heroku. Set a global variable POSTGRES_DB with value database_name.
